name: github-mcp-proxy
description: Forwards GitHub MCP tools to Claude Desktop via a local auth shim. Requires your own GitHub PAT — no shared credentials.
long_description: A minimal stdio↔HTTP proxy that bridges Claude Desktop to GitHub's hosted MCP endpoint (https://api.githubcopilot.com/mcp). Your Personal Access Token is stored securely in your OS keychain and injected at runtime. No custom backend, no GitHub App — just a thin local transport shim.

github_token.title: GitHub Personal Access Token
github_token.description: A classic PAT or fine-grained token with the scopes you need (e.g. repo, read:org). Create one at https://github.com/settings/tokens
